seo.title: Online Image to GLB Converter | Creative Lab
seo.description: Convert PNG, JPG, WebP, GIF and SVG images into GLB files directly in your browser with Creative Lab.
seo.ogDescription: Convert an image into a GLB file directly in your browser.
seo.twitterTitle: Image to GLB Converter | Creative Lab
seo.twitterDescription: Convert PNG, JPG, WebP, GIF and SVG into GLB in your browser.

product.title: Image to GLB Converter
product.description: Convert an image into a textured 3D plane exported as a GLB file for compatible viewers and projects.

converter.title: Select an image
converter.intro: For best results, use a transparent PNG image.
converter.uploadTitle: Drag an image here or click to select it
converter.uploadHelp: PNG, JPG, WebP, GIF or SVG. Maximum 25 MB.
converter.noteText: The image is converted into a textured 3D plane. Animated GIF files use only one frame.

viewer.title: 3D preview
viewer.description: Rotate the model with your mouse or finger before downloading the GLB.

messages.invalidFormat: Select a PNG, JPG, WebP, GIF or SVG image.
messages.fileTooLarge: The image exceeds the 25 MB limit.
messages.canvasError: The image could not be prepared.
messages.readError: The image could not be read.
messages.convertError: The GLB file could not be created.

info.title: How to create a GLB file with Creative Lab
info.description: The tool prepares the image, creates a textured 3D plane and exports everything as a GLB file.
info.stepOneText: Select a compatible image from your device.
info.stepTwoText: Set resolution and transparency before exporting.
info.stepThreeText: Review the 3D view and download the GLB file.
